card_description: Rog Phillips is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the "Fallen" state of humanity through the metaphor of a fairy child in the mortal world (*The Red Feather*)."
